block.minescreen.speaker: Speaker
screen.minescreen.source: URL, local MP4 path, or VNC address
screen.minescreen.keyboard.no_link: Keyboard is not linked to an interactive screen by adjacency or cable
screen.minescreen.keyboard.entered: Fixed keyboard mode entered; Esc exits
screen.minescreen.web.pointer_lock: WEB POINTER LOCK · Esc to exit
screen.minescreen.media_id: Shared media ID (enter the same ID on each multiplayer client)
screen.minescreen.label.video_source: Local MP4 path or HTTP(S) video URL
screen.minescreen.label.web_source: Web address (HTTPS is added when omitted)
screen.minescreen.vnc.connection_failed: VNC connection failed: %s. Check the password, security settings and address; save the profile again to retry.
screen.minescreen.guide.video: Choose a local MP4 or enter a direct HTTP(S) video URL
screen.minescreen.guide.web: Enter an address, then choose Load / Go
screen.minescreen.guide.vnc: Enter the RFB server address; the password stays local
screen.minescreen.help.idle: Shows a color test pattern with a centered IDLE mark and makes no external connection. Remove it with an iron-or-better pickaxe in the main hand.
screen.minescreen.help.video: VIDEO, WEB and VNC addresses are stored separately. In multiplayer, each player selects their own local file and enters the same shared media ID; the server synchronizes only that ID and playback time, never paths or frames.
screen.minescreen.help.vnc: Concurrent control is enabled by default with no exclusive lease. The crosshair maps directly to the remote framebuffer every frame; read-only mode stops forwarding. Classic VNC is unencrypted; use a trusted tunnel.
screen.minescreen.guide.web_singleplayer: This integrated world is not open to LAN: HTTP, localhost, private networks, and arbitrary domains are available by default. The crosshair maps to the page pointer every frame. Keyboard input requires a held or linked fixed keyboard. Shift + Load opens a new tab.
screen.minescreen.guide.web_protected: Multiplayer/LAN policy is active: HTTPS allow-list only by default. Enable allow_http in NeoForge Config when needed. The crosshair maps to the page pointer every frame; keyboard input requires a held/fixed keyboard.
screen.minescreen.computer.title: MineScreen Computer
screen.minescreen.computer.surface_count: %s independent screen surfaces connected (cable required across planes)
screen.minescreen.computer.surface_adjus: Select a surface, reorder automatic layouts, or use arrows to move it on a custom canvas.
screen.minescreen.computer.joined_split_: A joined canvas shares one source. Use the right button to make the selected surface an independent split.
screen.minescreen.status.independent_spl: Independent split enabled; each physical screen can now be configured separately
screen.minescreen.computer.no_link: Computer is not linked to a screen by adjacency or extension cable
screen.minescreen.power.required: Screen is off. Power an attached extension cable before opening its panel.
screen.minescreen.power.computer_warning: Connected screen is not powered; computer settings remain available.
screen.minescreen.computer.mouse_help: The preview has built-in mouse and keyboard input. Click it to focus; clicks and wheel events remain inside the preview.
screen.minescreen.computer.keyboard_idle: Built-in keyboard: click preview to enable
screen.minescreen.computer.keyboard_acti: Built-in keyboard connected; Esc releases input
screen.minescreen.computer.tile_help: Choose a content region, then click tiles to assign their purpose: M=main, 1–3=independent regions; Shift-click enables/disables.
screen.minescreen.region.empty: Assign at least one physical screen tile to this region first
screen.minescreen.computer.content_help: The WEB address follows the active tab. Enter or Load navigates it; Shift + Load opens a new tab. Configure regions 1–3 from Main Screen Info.
screen.minescreen.status.resolution_rest: Resolution changed; saving rebuilds the content texture/viewport
screen.minescreen.status.file_selected: Video selected; save to start playback
screen.minescreen.status.video_state_cha: Video playback setting changed; save to apply it fully
screen.minescreen.video.waiting_paused: Video is paused; choose Play to continue
screen.minescreen.video.stage.decoding: Waiting for the first video packet…
screen.minescreen.video.stage.converting: Converting and uploading the first frame…
screen.minescreen.status.web_loaded: Address saved and loading; in-page links may navigate too
screen.minescreen.status.web_tab_opened: Opened in a new tab; Shift-click a tab to close it
screen.minescreen.status.split_changed: Browser tab layout updated without reloading any page
screen.minescreen.error.local_files_bloc: Local files are blocked; enable allow_file_protocol in NeoForge Config
screen.minescreen.error.media_id: Media ID may contain letters, digits, dots, underscores, and hyphens only
screen.minescreen.error.video_file: Choose an existing, readable file with the .mp4 extension
screen.minescreen.error.video_source: Enter a local MP4 path or a direct HTTP(S) video URL
screen.minescreen.error.video_url: Invalid video URL; use a direct http:// or https:// address
screen.minescreen.error.video_blocked: The current network policy blocked this video URL
screen.minescreen.error.video_scheme: Only local MP4 files and HTTP(S) video URLs are supported
screen.minescreen.error.web_blocked: The current policy blocked this address; check scheme, allow-list, and IP settings
screen.minescreen.error.web_uses_video_s: The WEB address will not use the VIDEO path; enter the original page address
screen.minescreen.error.vnc_blocked: The current allow-list/IP policy blocked this VNC address
screen.minescreen.error.browser_not_runn: Browser is not running; verify MCEF is installed and check the backend error
minescreen.configuration.unrestricted_si: Enabled by default. Bypasses URL, IP, whitelist, HTTP, localhost/private-network, cloud metadata, and local-file restrictions only in an integrated world that is not open to LAN. LAN and multiplayer remain protected.
minescreen.configuration.allow_http.tool: Risk: clear-text HTTP can be read or modified by network observers.
minescreen.configuration.allow_localhost: Risk: pages and media sources can reach services running on the player's computer.
minescreen.configuration.allow_private_i: Risk: permits access to routers, NAS devices, and other RFC1918/IPv6 ULA services.
minescreen.configuration.allow_cloud_met: High risk: cloud metadata endpoints can disclose instance credentials.
minescreen.configuration.disable_whiteli: Risk: permits connections to arbitrary remote domains.
minescreen.configuration.allow_file_prot: Risk: screen content can read local files; this also controls local MP4 playback.
minescreen.configuration.domain_whitelis: Browser and VNC hostnames allowed while the whitelist is enabled; subdomains also match.
minescreen.configuration.default_width_b: Stage-1 compatibility only; newly placed blocks are always single auto-joining tiles.
minescreen.configuration.default_height_: Stage-1 compatibility only; newly placed blocks are always single auto-joining tiles.
minescreen.configuration.max_render_dist: Decoder and browser rendering pause beyond this distance.
minescreen.configuration.default_screen_: Maximum audible range in blocks from the screen center when no connected speaker is better.
minescreen.configuration.speaker_sound_d: Maximum audible range in blocks from each directly or extension-cable-connected speaker.
minescreen.configuration.pixels_per_tile: Logical pixels contributed by one screen block along each axis.
minescreen.configuration.default_resolut: Default render scale for new screens. Lower WEB values enlarge page UI and reduce CPU/GPU cost.
minescreen.configuration.max_canvas_pixe: The canvas is scaled down uniformly when this total is exceeded.
minescreen.configuration.video_max_fps.t: Maximum near-distance video decode and upload rate.
minescreen.configuration.video_far_fps.t: Decode and upload rate beyond half the maximum render distance.
minescreen.configuration.max_active_cont: Maximum finalized VIDEO/WEB/VNC backends. Extra screens wait in the asynchronous queue so decoder/browser creation cannot arrive as one large hitch.
minescreen.configuration.max_active_canv: Combined logical-pixel budget for loaded backends, bounding NativeImage, Chromium and VNC framebuffer memory peaks.
minescreen.configuration.max_web_tabs_pe: Maximum Chromium tabs retained by one WEB session. Restored tabs are created at one per client tick.
minescreen.configuration.vnc_compression: Range 0–9. Level 9 saves the most bandwidth at greater VNC-server zlib CPU cost.
minescreen.configuration.vnc_jpeg_qualit: Range 0–9. Lower values are more aggressive; the default 5 favors bandwidth savings.
minescreen.configuration.vnc_max_fps.too: Maximum default VNC framebuffer request rate. Each screen may override it.
minescreen.configuration.ui_provider.too: auto selects a registered adapter, vanilla disables adapters, or enter an id supplied by an Otyacraft-style integration.
minescreen.configuration.composite_ui_la: Composites media, frames, glyphs, input text and carets into one texture. Recommended with ModernUI.
minescreen.configuration.web_peer_distri: The server exchanges only endpoints and a random token; compressed frames use a direct player tree. This exposes network addresses to same-screen peers and the current direct link is unencrypted. Enable on server and clients.
minescreen.configuration.web_peer_listen: 0 chooses an ephemeral port. Internet peers normally require a fixed TCP port forwarded by the router.
minescreen.configuration.web_peer_fps.to: Affects peer frames only; the root player's local MCEF frame rate is unchanged.
minescreen.configuration.web_peer_max_wi: Lower values substantially reduce readback, JPEG encoding and upload cost; height follows the aspect ratio.
minescreen.configuration.web_peer_jpeg_q: 20–90. Lower values save bandwidth; the default 58 favors aggressive compression.
minescreen.configuration.web_peer_max_up: Includes all downstream peers for this client. Frames are dropped instead of queued when the budget is exhausted.
minescreen.configuration.control_indicat: ARGB hexadecimal color of the small CONTROLLING label.
One of bottom_right, bottom_left, top_right, or top_left.
minescreen.configuration.show_idle_indic: Allows a faint idle mark when nobody is controlling the screen.
minescreen.configuration.web_loading_sty: Choose the WEB loading animation style.
minescreen.configuration.web_loading_acc: ARGB hexadecimal accent color used by WEB loading pages.
minescreen.configuration.web_loading_bac: ARGB hexadecimal base color used when no cached thumbnail is available.
minescreen.configuration.web_loading_spe: 25–300 percent; 100 is the normal animation speed.
minescreen.configuration.web_loading_sho: Displays the last local page snapshot while Chromium restores the page.
Shows the original MineScreen pixel assistant on loading and error pages.
Shows the small pixel assistant in MineScreen and native NeoForge configuration panels.
